arts.ttl: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta makes controversial Man City Champions League dig
arts.sum: Arsenal are currently in Lisbon preparing to face Sporting in the Champions League on Tuesday night and manager Mikel Arteta has been speaking to the media

arts.ttl: Man United and Arsenal have handed Man City perfect example to follow ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: City will fall 11 points behind league leaders Liverpool if they lose at Anfield next weekend

arts.ttl: Man City suffer new injury blow before crunch Liverpool clash as nightmare run continues
arts.sum: Liverpool are already eight points clear of Manchester City at the top of the Premier League, with Pep Guardiola's men on a run of five successive defeats ahead of Sunday's clash at Anfield

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola 'makes decision' over Liam Delap buyback clause
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly make a decision over whether they plan to exercise their right to buy-back Ipswich Town forward Liam Delap.

arts.ttl: Tottenham goalkeeper played an hour against Man City with a fractured ankle. He kept a clean sheet
arts.sum: Tottenham goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario says he played for an hour against Manchester City with a fractured right ankle that has since required surgery. “I played 60 minutes at the Etihad with a broken bone in my ankle, giving absolutely everything I had for the team.

arts.ttl: Man City hit with fresh injury blow as star man misses training ahead of Champions League clash - as Pep Guardiola's side attempt to reverse their fortunes after a FIFTH consecutive defeat
arts.sum: The Cityzens' recent woes have been influenced by a string of injuries to key men including long-term issues for Rodri and Oscar Bobb and more recent knocks to the likes of Mateo Kovacic.

arts.ttl: Man City line-up vs Feyenoord predicted as Kevin De Bruyne call made and Pep Guardiola view clear
arts.sum: Manchester City team news ahead of crucial Champions League clash

arts.ttl: Man City vs Feyenoord – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City host Feyenoord in the Champions League on Tuesday night aiming to address their alarming run of form. Pep Guardiola’s side have lost five consecutive games in all competitions, their longest run of defeats in 18 years. It’s the first time in Guardiola’s managerial career that he has lost five games in a row. arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Feyenoord – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City return to Champions League action this week as they welcome Dutch outfit Feyenoord to the Etihad Stadium. As it stands, Pep Guardiola’s side are lying just outside of the guaranteed Round of 16 spots after collecting seven points from their opening four games. arts.ttl: For Pep Guardiola, there is only one solution to ending Manchester City’s crisis
arts.sum: Guardiola will not abandon the blueprint that has brought City unprecendented success, despite a run of five defeats in a row
